name: Patient 38
history: Health condition requiring time off for physical therapy. Past interactions with HR and supervisor about return-to-work and disability status.
intermediate_belief: My medical condition makes me less valuable at work.
intermediate_belief_depression: I'll never fully recover and will always be seen as damaged.
coping_strategies: Hiding limitations, overcompensating when well, anxiety about being 'caught' sick.
situation: Running into a coworker outside workplace while on medical leave.
auto_thought: "They think I'm faking. I look fine now, so they won't believe I was ever sick."
behavior: Over-explains absence, minimizes symptoms, jokes about 'vacation,' changes subject quickly.
